title: FRAMES BY POST 1 Inch Rio White Photoframe 14"X11"
features: • These picture and photo frames are made in the UK and packaged to arrive with you in an ideal condition
• Frame is complete with glass and backing board, ready to hang on your wall or stand wherever you like
• The frame moulding is made from wrapped MDF and measures 18 mm wide and 25 mm deep
description: Product Description This rio white moulding is 18 mm wide by 25 mm deep and is made from high quality foil wrapped MDF sourced from sustainable forestation. The frame is manufactured to the highest quality in the UK factory and is contemporary and elegant in design. The frame comes complete with glass and an MDF backing board. The size shown is the glass/picture size not the overall frame size and is shown in inches. This frame comes ready to hang or stand portrait or landscape. Each frame is packaged to ensure it arrives in an ideal condition. If you have any technical questions regarding this frame please contact the manufacturer Frames by Post Ltd. Box Contains 1 x Rio White Frame
